title: Cobblemon: Nuzlocke
body:
# Cobblemon: Nuzlocke

This is a server-side Nuzlocke challenge mod for [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/) on Minecraft 1.21.1. It raises the stakes of your adventure by adding true consequences to battles. Perfect for servers looking to spice up their gameplay!

## How It Works

The rules are simple but strict:

1.  When you join, your Nuzlocke run starts.
2.  If a Pokémon faints—whether in a gym battle or against a wild encounter—it is marked as dead.
3.  By default, fallen Cobblémon are automatically released from your party.
4.  Healing dead Pokémon is blocked to ensure the rules are followed.
5.  You can check your history of fallen friends anytime using the graveyard command.

## Commands

### For Players

*   `/nuzlocke start` — Begin a fresh Nuzlocke run.
*   `/nuzlocke stop` — End your current run (asks for confirmation first!).
*   `/nuzlocke status` — Check how your current run is going.
*   `/nuzlocke graveyard` — Open a menu to view your fallen Pokémon.
*   `/nuzlocke rules` — See exactly which rules are currently active on the server.

### For Admins

*   `/nuzlocke config reload` — Reloads the settings from the file.
*   `/nuzlocke config show` — Display the current active settings in chat.
*   `/nuzlocke config permadeath <true/false>` — Toggle the perma-death rule on or off.
*   `/nuzlocke config announcedeaths <true/false>` — Toggle whether deaths are broadcasted to the whole server.
*   `/nuzlocke config deathhandling release` — Set the mod to auto-release fainted Pokémon.
*   `/nuzlocke config deathhandling markonly` — Set the mod to simply "mark" them as dead without releasing them.
*   `/nuzlocke config deathmessage <message>` — Customize the message shown when a Pokémon falls.

## Configuration

You can find the config file at `.minecraft/config/nuzlocke/nuzlocke.json`.
